objective: Add one private allowlisted count-only fixture to unblock full recursive reproduction while preserving the original lineage-portability constraints and exact expected values.
executable_blocker: The original stage proved that exact historical per-cluster sufficient statistics are necessary for reproduction and cannot be reconstructed from published aggregates; an owner-authorized sanitized derivative is now frozen.

required_properties: cluster identity is sequential and contains no source locator
event rows and timestamps are synthesized independently under temporary roots
source artifact is read only after exact SHA-256 verification
forbidden_properties: symbol price return or source timestamp
private path URL report path manifest or registry reference
floating derived rate influence effect or outcome metric
raw event row or strategy parameter

preservation_contract: all constraints and stop conditions from the prior envelope remain active
every existing expected value and assertion remains unchanged
every portable validator performs full reproduction after content and recursive-parent verification
default pinned production validation remains unchanged and fail closed
fixture values remain private to the Market test repository
acceptance_commands: verify frozen count source SHA-256 and 260-row allowlisted integer shape before one-time read
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider seven authorized BAN test modules
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider with no failures outside the two-file sibling portable-fixtures stage
exact write-set, fixture allowlist, assertion-preservation, reproduction, skip, bypass, private-locator, network and live-authority scan
original dirty checkout HEAD upstream tracked-diff and untracked-manifest hashes unchanged
rollback: Agent 0 discards the single worker commit and isolated branch/worktree, including the private count-only fixture. The read-only source artifact, original dirty checkout, pinned lineage, public Bridge and external systems remain unchanged.
